description_long: This is a large, modern suburban house set within a walled property featuring extensive landscaping and multiple structures. The main house is two stories tall with a gable roof, large windows, and a symmetrical facade. The property includes a driveway, a detached garage, a swimming pool with a poolside lounge area, and several garden sections with trees and shrubs. The front entryway is marked by a double-door entrance, flanked by decorative planters and a paved walkway. The rear of the property features a spacious patio and additional seating areas, all surrounded by a perimeter fence for privacy. The overall design is clean and contemporary, with a focus on open outdoor spaces and functional amenities.
description: A modern two-story house with a gable roof, large windows, landscaped gardens, a pool, and a detached garage within a fenced property.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, symmetrical landscaping, and the double-door entryway.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the swimming pool, poolside lounge chairs, and the detached garage at the rear.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the patio area, additional seating, and the back facade of the house with large windows.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the garden areas, perimeter fence, and the rear landscaping.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows with large rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Double-door entry with steps, flanked by planters and a paved walkway, no porch or columns
